candidates.why: Core operating sales/revenue line near the top of the income statement.
Appears to be the broader total revenue line including other business-related revenue; best match for top-line total revenue.

variables.notes: Used a priority list because revenue labeling may vary by year. Preferred the broader total revenue line first.

candidates.why: Direct cost line corresponding to revenue generation; best non-total COGS label.
Total cost of revenues line, identical to Cost of Operating Revenue here but less preferred because it is a total.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Revenue including Operation & Maintenance (Utility) - Total
candidates.why: Duplicate total-style COGS line in Other section; less preferred than primary operating revenue cost line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct non-total cost line and avoided duplicate total-style cost rows.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A row and populated; per rule hierarchy this should be selected alone when available.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Overhead component within SG&A, but less preferred than the explicit SG&A row because component rows should not be combined when a populated SG&A row exists.
Broad overhead bucket, but too broad when explicit SG&A exists.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row. It already excludes R&D by label, so no separate XRD row is included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is not an R&D expense line; it indicates SG&A excluding R&D, so it should not be used as XRD.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is present in the income statement preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct recurring interest expense line; more precise than net finance cost and avoids including FX/other non-interest items.
Also a direct interest expense line with identical values, likely an alternate standardized label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but appears to be a subset of total interest expense and would risk double counting if added.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Chose the main recurring interest expense line and avoided combining it with lease-interest subset or net finance totals.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes minority interest, which is required for BE.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only common equity line; good fallback if label changes.
Appears equal to parent common equity here; acceptable fallback.
Another common equity label matching parent/common equity; useful fallback.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Used parent/common equity labels only, excluding total equity including minority interest to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Alternate minority interest label; good fallback if balance-sheet label varies.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet minority interest labels as priority list for non-controlling interests.
